summary: The circular-argument defense is fully addressed by EXP-216 Patch 1 (detail_evidence full-field replacement). Argument (3) now names the circularity objection explicitly ('A charitable reading objects that this is circular...') and answers it with the accounting-is-the-point preemptive: we don't dispute the six-text convergence exists, we dispute that the dome counts WIN-031 in its 69 confirmed / 94.5% accuracy scorecard alongside empirically tested claims (Schumann frequency WIN-029, SAA field strength WIN-014). EXP-216 Patches 3 and 4 propagate the scorecard-accounting critique to tldr_verdict and finding so the preemptive travels at every reading depth. Close on integration.
